title: fix(tier): correct created_at unit mismatch in spore-to-seed fast-path
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: The fast track to Seed
gist.blurb: Fixed a tiny time-math bug that was making new Spores wait too long to become Seeds. Now you'll get your Seed upgrade within 8 hours of signing up, just as nature intended.
gist.summary: Resolved a unit mismatch in the tier progression logic that prevented new Spore accounts from being fast-tracked to the Seed tier.
gist.impact: New users will now correctly receive their Seed tier upgrade within 8 hours of signing up, rather than waiting up to a week.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'Spore' (mushroom) to 'Seed' (plant) progression happening faster due to a time/clock fix. Visuals: Polly the bee holding a stopwatch or clock, watching a tiny mushroom spore quickly turn into a glowing green seed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, holding a glowing pocket watch as a tiny mushroom spore transforms into a bright green seed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
